creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Wed, Sep 20, 2000 at 02:20:32PM +0400, Dmitry S. Sivachenko wrote:
> >Synopsis:       New port: net/yaz

Hi Dmitry,

Just a little nag..:

> #	./files
> #	./files/md5
> #	./pkg
> #	./pkg/COMMENT
> #	./pkg/DESCR
> #	./pkg/PLIST
> #	./Makefile
> #	./patches
> #	./patches/patch-aa
> #	./patches/patch-ab

Please DTRT in the future; use the canonical name of the directory these
files belong in.  I.e., yaz/files, yaz/files/md5, and so forth.

Thanks.

--
